checks.saladNotMade: You didn't make the salad. Make sure you call makeSalad() with all four ingredients.
checks.needLeavesRandomInt: You need to call Math.randomInt(40, 100) to generate the number of leaves.
checks.needTomatoesRandomInt: You need to call Math.randomInt(5, leaves / 5) to generate the number of tomatoes.
checks.needCroutonsRandomInt: You need to call Math.randomInt(tomatoes, tomatoes * 2) to generate the number of croutons.
checks.needOlivesRandomInt: You need to call Math.randomInt(1, tomatoes / 2) to generate the number of olives.

makeRandomSalad.name: Make a random salad
makeRandomSalad.description: Generate a random amount of each ingredient using Math.randomInt() and make the salad.

randomSalad.name: Random salad
randomSalad.description: Make a salad with random amounts of each ingredient.

leavesExample.question: Give me an example of how to work out the leaves
leavesExample.answer: Use `let leaves = Math.randomInt(40, 100)` to generate a random amount of salad leaves that you can then use in the other functions.

leavesCount.question: How many leaves do I need?

tomatoesCount.question: How many tomatoes do I need?
tomatoesCount.answer: At least 5, but no more than leaves / 5

croutonsCount.question: How many croutons do I need?
croutonsCount.answer: At least as many as tomatoes, up to double the amount of tomatoes

olivesCount.question: How many olives do I need?
olivesCount.answer: At least 1, up to half the number of tomatoes

makeSalad.question: How do I make the salad?
makeSalad.answer: Once you've worked out how many ingredients you need for each, input leaves, tomatoes, croutons, olives into makeSalad().

makeSalad.description: Makes a salad with the given amounts of each ingredient.
